zh.lifeSummary: 當Aimery of Thouars IV於大約1024年出生在法國波特-哈倫斯多武-瑟艾福雷斯度時，他的父親Geoffrey II of Thouars35歲，母親Agnes de Blois36歲。他和Auremgarde Mauleon至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。他於1066年登記服兵役。他去世於1093年在法國布列塔尼o-達阿爾莫拉 艾享年70歲，埋葬在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易波代沙吉尼可拉斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Aimery of Thouars IV于大约1024年出生在法国波特-哈倫斯多武-瑟艾福雷斯度时，他的父亲Geoffrey II of Thouars35岁，母亲Agnes de Blois36岁。他和Auremgarde Mauleon至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。他于1066年登记服兵役。他去世于1093年在法国布列塔尼o-達阿爾莫拉 艾享年70岁，埋葬在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易波代沙吉尼可拉斯。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Aimery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Gloucestershire and Wiltshire, of Norman origin): variant of   Damery  , a habitational name from Daumeray (Maine-et-Loire), France.

en.lifeSummary: When Aimery of Thouars IV was born about 1024, in Doux, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, France, his father, Geoffrey II of Thouars, was 35 and his mother, Agnes de Blois, was 36. He had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Auremgarde Mauleon. He registered for military service in 1066. He died in 1093, in La Chèze, Côtes-d'Armor, Brittany, France, at the age of 70, and was buried in Saint-Nicolas, Vendée, Pays de la Loire, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Aimery of Thouars IV est né environ 1024, à Doux, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, France, son père, Geoffrey II of Thouars, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Blois, avait 36 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Auremgarde Mauleon. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1066. Il est décédé en 1093, à La Chèze, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, France, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Saint-Nicolas, Vendée, Pays de la Loire, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Aimery of Thouars IV um 1024 in Doux, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Geoffrey II of Thouars 35 und seine Mutter Agnes de Blois 36. Er hatte mit Auremgarde Mauleon mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1066 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1093 im Alter von 70 Jahren in La Chèze, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Frankreich und wurde in Saint-Nicolas, Vendée, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Aimery of Thouars IV è nato il circa 1024 nel Doux, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, il suo padre, Geoffrey II of Thouars, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Agnes de Blois, aveva 36 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Auremgarde Mauleon. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1066. Morì nel 1093, nel La Chèze, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Francia, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Saint-Nicolas, Vendée, Pays de la Loire, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Aimery of Thouars IVが約1024年にフランスポイトウ-チャーエンツデウクス-スevレスドウックスで生まれた時，父Geoffrey II of Thouarsは35歳，母Agnes de Bloisは36歳であった。彼はAuremgarde Mauleonとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1066年に兵役登録をした。彼は1093年にフランスブレタグンクoテス-ド'アルモーラ チeズで70歳で死去し，フランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーベンドeサイント-ニコラスにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint-Michel-en-l'Herm, Vendée, Pays de: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 븐드e 세인트-믹헬--'헤

ko.lifeSummary: Aimery of Thouars IV(이)가 대략 1024년 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 데우스-스e브레스 다스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffrey II of Thouars(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Blois(은)는 36세였다. 그는 Auremgarde Mauleon(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1066년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1093년 프랑스 브레타그니 co츠-드'아모르 라 che즈에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 븐드e 세인트-니콜라스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Aimery of Thouars IV nasceu aproximadamente 1024, em Doux, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, França, seu pai, Geoffrey II of Thouars, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Blois, tinha 36 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Auremgarde Mauleon. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1066. Ele faleceu em 1093, em La Chèze, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, França, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Saint-Nicolas, Vendée, Pays de la Loire, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Aimery of Thouars IV родился около 1024 г. в местности доукс, деукс-сeвресь, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция, его отцу по имени Geoffrey II of Thouars было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Blois, 36. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Auremgarde Mauleon. В 1066 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1093 г. в местности ла чeз, кoтес-д'армор, бретагн, Франция в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности сеинт-николас, вендe, пеис де ла лоир, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Aimery of Thouars IV nació aproximadamente 1024, en Doux, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, su papá, Geoffrey II of Thouars, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Agnes de Blois, tenía 36 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Auremgarde Mauleon. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1066. Murió en 1093, en La Chèze, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Francia, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Saint-Nicolas, Vendée, Pays de la Loire, Francia.
